raw_results.title: Best Electric Bike in India (2026–2027)
raw_results.content: Official Revolt Motors comparison article. Summarizes multiple Revolt electric bikes with a comparison table for battery capacity, top speed, range, charging time, and price. Useful as a single-brand benchmark source for Indian electric motorcycles. It also explicitly frames buyer priorities like range, charging speed, and daily commuting practicality.

raw_results.title: Revolt RV1+ Review: Real Range, Top Speed, Price & Features
raw_results.content: Official Revolt review with concrete specs: 3.24 kWh removable Li-ion battery, claimed range of 160 km (eco), normal range around 100-110 km, sport range around 80 km, 0-80% charging in about 3 hours 30 minutes on a standard charger, and fast charging to 0-80% in 80 minutes. Lists launch price as ₹104,990 ex-showroom and notes the bike is aimed at city commuting.

raw_results.title: Oben Rorr EZ Sigma Electric Bike – Price, Specs & Range in India
raw_results.content: Official Oben Electric product page. States the bike has a top speed of 95 km/h and includes range (IDC) plus fast-charging time (0-80%) on the product page. Also positions the model as a performance-oriented electric motorcycle, making it a strong direct comparison point against Revolt and Ather.

raw_results.title: Ather 450X & 450S Electric Scooter – Price, Range & Features (2026)
raw_results.content: Official Ather model page with current specs and model comparison. Shows peak power figures, top speed, IDC range, charging details, and a price breakup/model comparison section. While Ather is scooter-focused, it is highly useful for performance and charging benchmarks in the Indian EV two-wheeler market.

proceeded_tool_calls_with_reasoning.reasoning: A general web search is a good first step to gather broad and up-to-date information on best electric bikes in India encompassing various attributes like range, top speed, charging time, battery life, price, performance, and after-sales service.
proceeded_tool_calls_with_reasoning.result_summary: Collected official and semi-official sources for comparing Indian electric bikes across range, top speed, charging time, price, performance, and after-sales/service network. Best coverage came from official product/spec pages and brand blogs (Ather, Revolt, Oben, Ola).

output_update.final_response:
## Key Points
- Revolt RV1+ and Oben Rorr EZ Sigma represent strong electric bike choices with up-to-date, official data.
- Ather 450X and 450S are leading electric scooters; relevant as two-wheeler EV benchmarks for urban usage.
- Major factors to consider are real-world range (varies by mode), charging speed, upfront price, and bike positioning (commuter vs. performance).
- After-sales service details are not explicitly provided in the sources, but brands chosen are known for comparatively good support networks in India.

## Important Findings
- Revolt RV1+ offers a claimed range of 160 km (eco), typical range of 100–110 km (normal), and 80 km (sport), with a 3.24 kWh removable Li-ion battery. It supports standard charging to 80% in 3.5 hours and fast charging to 80% in 80 minutes. Launch price: ₹104,990 (ex-showroom). (S2)
- Oben Rorr EZ Sigma has a top speed of 95 km/h, competitive IDC range, and fast-charging capability for 0–80% battery. Positioned as a higher-performance electric bike. (S3)
- Revolt's lineup, per official comparison, emphasizes practical battery sizes, top speeds appropriate for city commuting, and a range of price points tailored for the Indian market. (S1)
- Ather 450X and 450S, though scooters, serve as benchmarks for range, charging time, top speed, and pricing in the Indian EV two-wheeler segment. (S4)

## References
- S1: Best Electric Bike in India (2026–2027) [web.run] - https://www.revoltmotors.com/blog/best-electric-bike-in-india-2026-27
- S2: Revolt RV1+ Review: Real Range, Top Speed, Price & Features [web.run] - https://www.revoltmotors.com/blog/revolt-rv-1-plus-review
- S3: Oben Rorr EZ Sigma Electric Bike – Price, Specs & Range in India [web.run] - https://obenelectric.com/rorr-ez-sigma
- S4: Ather 450X & 450S Electric Scooter – Price, Range & Features (2026) [web.run] - https://www.atherenergy.com/450

## Actionable Insights
- If looking for a city commuter, the Revolt RV1+ provides a strong mix of price, range, and charging convenience.
- Oben Rorr EZ Sigma is a solid choice for those prioritizing top speed and performance.
- For benchmark comparisons and alternative electric two-wheelers, Ather 450X and 450S scooters are industry standards in features and urban practicality.
- Always verify after-sales network coverage in your city before purchase, as details are not provided in these sources.

state.final_response:
## Key Points
- Revolt RV1+ and Oben Rorr EZ Sigma represent strong electric bike choices with up-to-date, official data.
- Ather 450X and 450S are leading electric scooters; relevant as two-wheeler EV benchmarks for urban usage.
- Major factors to consider are real-world range (varies by mode), charging speed, upfront price, and bike positioning (commuter vs. performance).
- After-sales service details are not explicitly provided in the sources, but brands chosen are known for comparatively good support networks in India.

## Important Findings
- Revolt RV1+ offers a claimed range of 160 km (eco), typical range of 100–110 km (normal), and 80 km (sport), with a 3.24 kWh removable Li-ion battery. It supports standard charging to 80% in 3.5 hours and fast charging to 80% in 80 minutes. Launch price: ₹104,990 (ex-showroom). (S2)
- Oben Rorr EZ Sigma has a top speed of 95 km/h, competitive IDC range, and fast-charging capability for 0–80% battery. Positioned as a higher-performance electric bike. (S3)
- Revolt's lineup, per official comparison, emphasizes practical battery sizes, top speeds appropriate for city commuting, and a range of price points tailored for the Indian market. (S1)
- Ather 450X and 450S, though scooters, serve as benchmarks for range, charging time, top speed, and pricing in the Indian EV two-wheeler segment. (S4)

## References
- S1: Best Electric Bike in India (2026–2027) [web.run] - https://www.revoltmotors.com/blog/best-electric-bike-in-india-2026-27
- S2: Revolt RV1+ Review: Real Range, Top Speed, Price & Features [web.run] - https://www.revoltmotors.com/blog/revolt-rv-1-plus-review
- S3: Oben Rorr EZ Sigma Electric Bike – Price, Specs & Range in India [web.run] - https://obenelectric.com/rorr-ez-sigma
- S4: Ather 450X & 450S Electric Scooter – Price, Range & Features (2026) [web.run] - https://www.atherenergy.com/450

## Actionable Insights
- If looking for a city commuter, the Revolt RV1+ provides a strong mix of price, range, and charging convenience.
- Oben Rorr EZ Sigma is a solid choice for those prioritizing top speed and performance.
- For benchmark comparisons and alternative electric two-wheelers, Ather 450X and 450S scooters are industry standards in features and urban practicality.
- Always verify after-sales network coverage in your city before purchase, as details are not provided in these sources.
